sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ أَحْدَثَ الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ نَقْلَةً نَوْعِيَّةً فِي مَسَارِ النَّثْرِ الْعَرَبِيِّ، إِذْ أَرْسَى قَوَاعِدَ جَدِيدَةً لِلْبَلَاغَةِ وَالْفَصَاحَةِ لَمْ تَعْهَدْهَا الْعَرَبُ مِنْ قَبْلُ.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an je donio kvalitativni pomak u razvoju arapske proze, jer je postavio nova pravila rječitosti i jasnoće koja Arapi ranije nisu poznavali.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran brought about a qualitative shift in the trajectory of Arabic prose, as it established new rules of eloquence and clarity that the Arabs had not known before.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ نَظَرْنَا إِلَى الْخُطَبِ وَالرَّسَائِلِ فِي الْعُصُورِ التَّالِيَةِ، لَوَجَدْنَا أَثَرَ النَّظْمِ الْقُرْآنِيِّ جَلِيًّا فِي اخْتِيَارِ الْأَلْفَاظِ وَدِقَّةِ التَّعْبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Da pogledamo govore i pisma u narednim epohama, našli bismo jasan uticaj kur'anskog stila u odabiru riječi i preciznosti izražavanja.
sentences.translationEn: If we were to look at the speeches and letters in subsequent eras, we would find the influence of the Quranic arrangement clearly in the choice of words and precision of expression.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا اسْتُخْدِمَ السَّجْعُ غَيْرُ الْمُتَكَلَّفِ لِإِضْفَاءِ جَرْسٍ مُوسِيقِيٍّ يَأْخُذُ بِلُبِّ السَّامِعِ وَيُعِينُهُ عَلَى تَدَبُّرِ الْمَعَانِي.
sentences.translation: Također, korištena je prirodna rima (saj') kako bi se dodao muzički ton koji plijeni pažnju slušaoca i pomaže mu u razmišljanju o značenjima.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, unforced rhymed prose (Saj') was used to add a musical resonance that captivates the listener and aids in contemplating the meanings.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا التَّأْثِيرَ لَمْ يَقْتَصِرْ عَلَى الدِّينِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلِ امْتَدَّ لِيَشْمَلَ كُلَّ جَوَانِبِ الْفِكْرِ وَالْأَدَبِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj uticaj nije bio ograničen samo na religiju, već se proširio na sve aspekte misli i književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: This influence was not limited to religion alone, but extended to include all aspects of thought and literature.

sentences.arabic: عِلَاوَةً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، فَقَدْ صِيغَتِ الْمَفَاهِيمُ الْأَخْلَاقِيَّةُ وَالِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةُ بِقَالَبٍ لُغَوِيٍّ مَتِينٍ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى الْإِيجَازِ وَالْإِعْجَازِ.
sentences.translation: Pored toga, moralni i društveni koncepti oblikovani su u čvrstom jezičkom kalupu koji se oslanja na sažetost i nadnaravnost.
sentences.translationEn: Moreover, moral and social concepts were formulated in a solid linguistic mold relying on conciseness and inimitability.

sentences.arabic: فَالْجُمْلَةُ الِاسْمِيَّةُ، بِثَبَاتِهَا، صَارَتْ تُسْتَخْدَمُ لِلتَّعْبِيرِ عَنِ الْحَقَائِقِ الْمُطْلَقَةِ، بَيْنَمَا وُظِّفَتِ الْأَفْعَالُ لِتَصْوِيرِ الْحَرَكَةِ وَالتَّجَدُّدِ.
sentences.translation: Nominalna rečenica, svojom postojanošću, počela se koristiti za izražavanje apsolutnih istina, dok su glagoli upotrijebljeni za prikazivanje kretanja i obnavljanja.
sentences.translationEn: The nominal sentence, with its stability, came to be used to express absolute truths, while verbs were employed to depict movement and renewal.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا مَا حَاوَلَ الْأَدِيبُ أَنْ يُحَاكِيَ هَذَا النَّمَطَ، فَعَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَمْتَلِكَ نَاصِيَةَ اللُّغَةِ وَيَتَعَمَّقَ فِي دَلَالَاتِ الْحُرُوفِ وَالْكَلِمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ako pisac pokuša oponašati ovaj stil, mora ovladati jezikom i duboko prodrijeti u značenja slova i riječi.
sentences.translationEn: If a writer attempts to emulate this pattern, they must master the language and delve deeply into the connotations of letters and words.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، ظَلَّ النَّثْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ يَسْتَمِدُّ قُوَّتَهُ مِنْ هَذَا الْمَعِينِ الصَّافِي، مُحَافِظًا عَلَى هُوِيَّتِهِ الْجَمَالِيَّةِ عَبْرَ الْقُرُونِ.
sentences.translation: Tako je arapska proza nastavila crpiti snagu iz ovog čistog izvora, čuvajući svoj estetski identitet kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, Arabic prose has continued to derive its strength from this pure source, preserving its aesthetic identity across the centuries.
